acceptedVia: chat 2026-07-23 — candidate pasted and confirmed after comparing the three dependency diagrams
recordTitle: Catalog deepening: give the empty state a home (direction B)
summary: Direction B accepted: extract the accepted empty state from app.mjs glue into a named, directly tested empty-state.mjs. Its change-blueprint seed carries forward; directions A and C are preserved with their reopening conditions.

decisions.rationale: The empty state is the one accepted design living as untested glue; naming it turns chip drift into a test failure.

exampleWorking.rationale: The empty state is the one accepted design living as untested glue; naming it turns chip drift into a test failure.

canonicalBody:
# Catalog deepening — accepted direction

Direction B: extract emptyState(tag) into empty-state.mjs with direct
tests asserting the chip set equals the real tag set. Blueprint seed
handed to change-blueprint. Directions A (data/behavior split) and C
(fold url-tag) preserved with change conditions.
